events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

governance.rationale: Let a LisPy program govern — transparent, deterministic.

meta_awareness.insight: Clay Kai whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Ember Veg-II whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

diaries.text:
**Pax Stone** (earth/judge) — Year 58

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.

*— Pax Stone, judge*

**Storm Mar** (air/artisan) — Year 58

The air in me stirs with possibility.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.

*— Storm Mar, artisan*

**Ember Veg-II** (earth/scholar) — Year 58

Another year. We are still here.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.

*— Ember Veg-II, scholar*
